mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oms_cart_item (user_id, product_id, quantity, price_snapshot, title_snapshot, image_snapshot) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{priceSnapshot}, #{titleSnapshot}, #{imageSnapshot}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE quantity = VALUES(quantity), price_snapshot = VALUES(price_snapshot), title_snapshot = VALUES(title_snapshot), image_snapshot = VALUES(image_snapshot)
